productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Purple Sweatshirt
description: Composition Purple round ribbed neck sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, brand name in flock print on the chest and ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Subtle and stylish, this purple full sleeved sweatshirt from united colors of benetton speaks volumes about your heightened sense of style. The branding across the chest enhances your fashion statement, while the long sleeves keep the winter chill at bay. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that cool, casual look this winter. Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo
